task_completion.description: Open AstroImageJ and load the input Vcomb.fits image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: AstroImageJ application window is open displaying the image, with the window title or image metadata indicating 'Vcomb.fits'.

task_completion.description: Measure the median values of a 100x100 pixel region for both the bright core and a dark edge before processing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A rectangular selection box (ROI) is visible on the image. A 'Results' or 'Measurements' window is open showing the calculated median values for these regions.

task_completion.description: Open the Subtract Background dialog and configure the rolling ball radius to 50.0 pixels for a dark background.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Subtract Background' dialog box is visible. The 'Rolling ball radius' is set to 50.0, and 'Light background' is unchecked (or 'Dark background' is selected).

task_completion.description: Apply the rolling ball background subtraction to the image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The image in the AstroImageJ window visibly changes, showing a flattened background where the bright, uneven glow has been removed.

task_completion.description: Measure the median values of the same 100x100 pixel regions after the background subtraction.
task_completion.visual_evidence: New measurement entries appear in the 'Results' window corresponding to the flattened image, showing updated median values.

task_completion.description: Save the processed image as Vcomb_flattened.fits in the output directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box in AstroImageJ or a file manager window showing 'Vcomb_flattened.fits' being saved to the '~/AstroImages/gradient_removal/output/' directory.

task_completion.description: Save a text report containing the four measured median values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano) or terminal window showing the creation of 'background_report.txt' in the output directory, containing the four median values recorded from the AstroImageJ Results window.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the AstroImageJ GUI to perform the background subtraction.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with AstroImageJ menus (Process > Subtract Background) and dialogs, rather than running a terminal script or using a different tool like ImageMagick.

integrity.description: Verify the median values in the report match actual measurements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numbers typed or pasted into 'background_report.txt' must match the values visible in the AstroImageJ 'Results' window.

integrity.description: Verify the image was actually processed and not just renamed or copied.
integrity.visual_evidence: The visual appearance of the image in AstroImageJ must change (background flattened) before it is saved as the new FITS file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The rolling ball radius must be exactly 50.0 pixels. The output FITS file must be saved to '/home/ga/AstroImages/gradient_removal/output/Vcomb_flattened.fits'. The text report must be saved to '/home/ga/AstroImages/gradient_removal/output/background_report.txt'.
